title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: MCP Apps enable interactive UIs to render directly in VS Code chat as sandboxed iframes, allowing real-time data updates and user interaction without exposing the editor to external API calls or system modifications. Shopify uses this pattern for checkout flows and Excalidraw for interactive diagrams. The mechanism uses MCP tools that return data plus resource references to bundled HTML, which VS Code fetches and renders in an isolated context.
